user.title: Siemens OZW672
user.description:
Enter the address and credentials of your OZW672.
To use HTTP rather than HTTPS, enable it on the device first:
Home > 0.x OZW672.xx > Settings > Communication > Services.

data_description.hostname: Hostname or IP address of the OZW672. A static address is recommended.
data_description.protocol: HTTP is more reliable on this hardware, but must be enabled on the device first. HTTPS does not verify the certificate.
data_description.username: An OZW672 user account. A dedicated account in the Service user group is recommended.

device.title: Siemens OZW672 - Device Selection
device.description: Only devices with 'State: Generated' will be displayed here

data.use_device_longname: Use the Device Addr+Device as the Name
data.prefix_with_function: Prefix entities with Function? (eg "RVS43.345/109->DHW - Legionella function")
data.prefix_with_opline: Prefix entities with Operating Line Number? (eg "1640 Legionella function")

mainmenu.title: Siemens OZW672 - Main Menu
mainmenu.description: Please chose the Menu Item(s) you wish to discover

data.menuitems: Select one or more Menu Items

submenu.title: Siemens OZW672 - Menu: {item_name}
submenu.description: Select the Menu Items and/or Data Points to monitor

data.menuitems: Select one or more Submenu Items
data.datapoints: Select one or more Data Points

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the OZW672. Check the hostname/IP and that the device is reachable.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance is allowed.
abort.already_configured: This device is already set up. To add or change the datapoints it monitors, use Reconfigure on the existing entry rather than adding it again.
abort.wrong_device: That is a different device to the one this entry was set up for. Reconfigure can only change the datapoints of the same device.

data.use_device_longname: Use the Device Addr+Type instead of the DeviceName
